# Auto-import job applications from email

## Description

Automatically detect and import job application data by parsing confirmation emails from the user's inbox.

## Suggested Features

- Connect to email via OAuth (Gmail, Outlook)
- Parse application confirmation emails to extract company, role, date, and status
- Use pattern matching and/or AI to classify email type (applied, interview invite, rejection, offer)
- Allow users to review and confirm auto-detected applications before importing
- Support periodic polling or push-based sync

## Motivation

Manually entering every application is the biggest friction point. Auto-importing from email eliminates this and ensures no applications are missed.
